summary: Infrastructure review for Settings/White-label/Crashlytics. Build configuration, dependency management, ProGuard rules, and Firebase integration all correct.

findings.finding: White-label setup: applicationId overridable via -PAPP_ID, APP_NAME via -PAPP_NAME. Both exposed as resValue and buildConfigField. Pattern is standard for Android white-label builds.
Timber 5.0.1 added as dependency. Version is current stable. ProGuard rule added for timber.log.** dontwarn.
Firebase Crashlytics initialization: disabled in debug, enabled in release. Timber tree selection per build type. Follows standard Android pattern.
Placeholder google-services.json is present with dummy values. This allows the build to succeed without a real Firebase project. Real values should be configured during deployment.

Custom RPC config storage added with simple JSON serialization. No external JSON library needed — avoids adding dependency to :core:storage module. Parsing is basic but sufficient for key:value pairs.
